summary: Landing page for Vocal Trace, a speech-development app for toddlers. High-conversion, professional, and playful design inspired by Speech Blubs. Navy blue (#1A365D), Teal Green (#2DADA3), and Soft Cream (#FEF9F3) color palette with 'Squishy' Magic Jelly UI elements.
architectural_notes: Color palette: Navy Blue #1A365D (primary), Teal Green #2DADA3 (accent), Soft Cream #FEF9F3 (background)
All containers use border-radius: 32px; no sharp corners anywhere
Magic Jelly buttons: glossy, rounded, tactile 3D style with inner-glow and drop shadow
Heavy sans-serif fonts for all headings for readability
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Cheerful cartoon toddler sitting and smiling, warm and playful illustration style on a soft cream background (hero-toddler.dim_600x700.png)
- Colorful rounded smartphone mockup showing a playful kids app UI with a cute cartoon animal character peeking from the bottom edge, teal and navy colors (hero-app-mockup.dim_600x700.png)
- Circular badge icon with a ribbon and star for 'Parent's Choice Award', grayscale flat illustration (badge-parents-choice.dim_120x120.png)
- Circular badge icon with a speech bubble and checkmark for 'Speech Pathology Approved', grayscale flat illustration (badge-speech-pathology.dim_120x120.png)
- Circular badge icon with a rocket and star for 'STEM Kids 2026', grayscale flat illustration (badge-stem-kids.dim_120x120.png)
- Rounded tablet screen mockup showing colorful jelly-style buttons being pressed, teal glow effects (feature-tactile.dim_560x420.png)
- Illustration of a friendly parental gate shield with a padlock and child-safe checkmark icon, teal and navy palette (feature-safe.dim_560x420.png)
- Teal checkmark merged with a small rocket launching upward, clean vector icon style on transparent background, used as the Vocal Trace logo mark (logo-icon.dim_80x80.png)

existing_features.title: Implement a global design system using Primary Navy Blue (#1A365D), Accent Teal Green (#2DADA3), and Soft Cream (#FEF9F3) as the background. Apply a heavy sans-serif font (e.g., 'Nunito' or 'Poppins' via Google Fonts) for all headings. All containers must use border-radius: 32px. No sharp corners anywhere on the page.

Build a sticky top navigation bar with the Vocal Trace logo (navy text 'Vocal Trace' with a teal checkmark-rocket icon rendered as SVG) on the left, navigation links in the center, and a small Magic Jelly 'Get Started' button on the right. The navbar background should be cream (#FEF9F3) with a subtle shadow on scroll.

Implement the Hero section with: headline 'Watch Their First Words Take Flight.' in heavy navy type, sub-headline 'The speech-boosting app that turns vocal traces into big milestones. Designed by experts, loved by little explorers.', a giant teal Magic Jelly CTA button labeled 'Start the Journey', and a split-screen illustration — left side showing a happy toddler, right side showing a colorful app UI with a 'Peeking Friend' character peeking from the bottom edge of a rounded screen mockup.

Add a Social Proof Bar below the hero: a clean horizontal row displaying three grayscale trust badges/logos for 'Parent's Choice Award', 'Speech Pathology Approved', and 'STEM Kids 2026'. Use small illustrated badge icons in grayscale with the label text below each. Separate them with subtle dividers.

Build the 'How It Works' section with a bold section heading, three equal columns each with a large rounded icon container (teal background), a step number, a bold title, and descriptive copy. Step 1: 'Listen' – 'Vocal Trace captures your child's unique vocalizations.' Step 2: 'Interact' – 'Our Magic Jelly UI responds to every sound with delightful haptic feedback.' Step 3: 'Grow' – 'Expert-backed pathways bridge the gap between babbling and words.'

Implement the Feature Showcase with an alternating left-right layout for two features. Feature A: 'Tactile Feedback' — 'Magic Jelly buttons that squish when touched to teach cause-and-effect.' Feature B: 'Safe Exploration' — '100% Ad-free, kid-safe environment with parental gates.' Each feature row should have an illustration/mockup on one side and bold headline + copy on the other, inside a rounded (32px) cream or light-teal card.

Build a Testimonial Section with a large soft navy/teal-tinted rounded card (border-radius: 32px) containing a parent quote about their child's speech progress, the parent's name and child's age, and large decorative quotation mark. Use a sample testimonial: '"Vocal Trace helped our daughter say her first real word in just three weeks. We cried happy tears!" — Sarah M., Mom of Lily, age 2.'

Add a Footer CTA section with a bold headline encouraging parents to get started, a teal Magic Jelly button labeled 'Unlock Their Voice Today', and a brief supporting tagline. Below it, include a minimal footer with the Vocal Trace logo, copyright notice, and links to Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.

Implement a scrolling dot-trail motif connecting all page sections. As the user scrolls, a series of small teal dots (inspired by the Vocal Trace logo motif) forms a decorative vertical path along the left or center of the page, creating a visual 'trace' or journey between sections. Use CSS animation or an SVG path with scroll-driven opacity/position to bring it to life.

new_feature_requests.summary: Hero section with headline, sub-headline, split-screen toddler/app image, and Teal Magic Jelly CTA button
Social proof bar with grayscale logos for Parent's Choice Award, Speech Pathology Approved, and STEM Kids 2026
How It Works section with 3 columns (Listen, Interact, Grow) and rounded icons
Feature showcase with alternating layout for Tactile Feedback and Safe Exploration features
Testimonial section with a large soft-blue rounded card and parent quote
Footer CTA with Teal Magic Jelly button labeled 'Unlock Their Voice Today'
Dot motif decorative trail connecting sections as user scrolls
3D gummy candy style buttons with inner-glow and drop shadow on Teal buttons

Create all Teal CTA buttons as 3D 'Magic Jelly' style: glossy background (#2DADA3), heavy inner-glow (inset box-shadow with a lighter teal), a subtle drop shadow beneath, border-radius: 32px, and a slight scale-down transform on :active to simulate a squish press. These buttons must look like 3D gummy candy.
